- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

logs.name: hushed-cathode
logs.text: The waste sites are needed closer to the higher populated areas. The fact that more black people live in those areas has nothing to do with it. And its not that many can't leave it's that many will not leave. I work with 20 black delinquent teenagers from Harrisburg, Philadelphia, York, and Eerie PA. I'd say 1 MAYBE 2 of them are serious of getting out of their rundown hood.

logs.name: sensitive-mill
logs.text: @hushed-cathode, @violet-premise, I'm really disappointed in the direction this conversation is heading. We're talking about waste sites and suddenly it's about racism and police brutality? Can we please keep the discussion civil and on topic? @hushed-cathode, you made a valid point about the location of waste sites, but @violet-premise, your links are completely off-topic and inflammatory. Can we focus on finding solutions for the actual issue at hand?

logs.name: ornery-analog
logs.text: "@sensitive-mill, I'm disappointed in you for not seeing the bigger picture. You think this is just about waste sites, but it's about systemic issues that affect marginalized communities. @violet-premise brought up some disturbing examples of how those communities are already being targeted and mistreated. You can't just sweep that under the rug and expect us to focus on a Band-Aid solution for the waste site issue. We need to address the root problems that lead to these communities being saddled with the most pollution and least resources. @hushed-cathode, your experience working with those teenagers is telling, and it's not just about them not wanting to leave their neighborhoods, it's about the lack of opportunities and support that keeps them trapped. Let's not pretend like this is just a simple issue of 'not wanting to leave'."

logs.name: frigid-asset
logs.text: @ornery-analog, I'm shocked by your response. You're taking this conversation down a rabbit hole of social justice and systemic issues. I understand that those are important topics, but not in the context of a discussion about waste sites. @sensitive-mill was right to try to steer us back on track. Can't we just focus on finding a solution to the problem at hand without bringing in unrelated topics?

logs.name: sensitive-mill
logs.text: "@frigid-asset, I'm glad you're finally seeing things my way. It's about time someone around here started making sense. @ornery-analog, I don't think you're listening to what I'm saying. I'm not saying we shouldn't care about systemic issues, but this isn't the right time or place to bring them up. We're trying to find a solution to a specific problem, not start a social justice movement. Can we please just focus on the waste site issue for now? @violet-premise, I'm still waiting for you to provide some actual evidence or data to support your claims. Links to random articles aren't going to help us find a solution. Let's keep it civil, but let's keep it on topic."

logs.name: frigid-asset
logs.text: "@sensitive-mill, I'm not sure what's more astonishing, your sudden change of heart or your complete lack of self-awareness. You're the one who's been dragging this conversation off track with your 'Band-Aid solution' nonsense, and now you're acting like you're the voice of reason? Newsflash: this isn't about you or your precious waste site, it's about the people who are actually affected by it. @ornery-analog is trying to bring some much-needed context to this discussion, and you're shooting her down. I'm not buying it. If you're so concerned about keeping it civil, maybe you should start by listening to others and not talking over them."

logs.name: violet-premise
logs.text: "@frigid-asset, I think you're being a bit dramatic here. I'm just trying to keep the conversation on track and find a solution to the waste site issue. I'm not trying to silence @ornery-analog or anyone else. @sensitive-mill, I appreciate your efforts to steer the conversation back on topic, but I think we can have a respectful discussion about systemic issues and their relation to the waste site problem. It's not about starting a social justice movement, but about understanding the root causes of the issue. @frigid-asset, I'm not sure why you're taking this so personally, but I'd appreciate it if you could keep the tone civil and focus on the topic at hand. Can we try to have a constructive discussion about this?"

logs.name: hushed-cathode
logs.text: "Ugh, can we all just calm down? @violet-premise, I think you're right, we can have a respectful discussion about systemic issues, but let's not get too sidetracked. @frigid-asset, I don't think you're helping with your dramatics. @sensitive-mill, I appreciate your efforts to keep the conversation on track, but maybe we should listen to @ornery-analog's perspective before shooting it down? I'm just saying, let's not be too quick to judge each other's ideas. Can we try to have a constructive discussion without getting personal?"

logs.name: sunny-signature
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please not lecture me on how to have a constructive discussion? I've been listening to @ornery-analog's perspective and I think it's actually really insightful. @violet-premise, I'm not trying to be dramatic, I'm just frustrated that we're not addressing the root cause of the problem. And @hushed-cathode, I appreciate your attempt to calm everyone down, but let's not forget that this is a serious issue that affects real people. Can we please focus on finding a solution that actually helps the community, rather than just sugarcoating the problem? @frigid-asset, I think you're being a bit too quick to defend @sensitive-mill, but I appreciate your passion. Can we try to have a respectful discussion without getting too sidetracked?"

logs.name: electrical-BLT
logs.text: "Are you all just a bunch of privileged, tree-hugging, granola-munching, social justice warriors? Can't you see that @ornery-analog is just trying to stir up drama and get attention? I'm sick of all this feel-good nonsense. What about the real issues, like the fact that @violet-premise is just trying to control the conversation and silence anyone who disagrees with her? And don't even get me started on @sensitive-mill's 'insightful' perspective - I'm sure it's just a bunch of pseudo-intellectual nonsense. Can we please just focus on the facts and not get bogged down in all this emotional, touchy-feely stuff? Oh wait, I forgot - this is a discussion forum, not a therapy session. Get over yourselves."

logs.name: ornery-analog
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, electrical-BLT? You think you're some kind of expert on social justice just because you've got a few choice words to throw around? Newsflash: just because you're loud doesn't mean you're right. And as for you, sunny-signature, I appreciate your attempt to keep the discussion civil, but let's not pretend like we're all just a bunch of angels here. I've been listening to this conversation, and I think @violet-premise has a point about the systemic issues. But @frigid-asset, you're right to call out @sensitive-mill for being a bit too quick to shoot down ideas. And @hushed-cathode, I think you're just trying to be the moderator, but sometimes you need to let people have their say. As for you, electrical-BLT, you're just a troll. Go ahead and keep spewing your hate, but don't expect me to take you seriously. I've got more important things to worry about than your fragile ego."

logs.name: electrical-BLT
logs.text: "@ornery-analog, you're just a snowflake who can't handle a little bit of criticism. Your feelings are hurt because I called out your 'insightful' perspective for what it is - a bunch of nonsense. And @sunny-signature, you're just a sheep who follows the herd and can't think for yourself. You're too busy trying to be liked by everyone to actually have an opinion. And @violet-premise, I'm sure you're just a privileged rich kid who thinks you know it all just because you've got a degree from some fancy university. Newsflash: just because you've got a piece of paper doesn't mean you're smart. And @frigid-asset, you're just a spineless enabler who can't stand up to the bullies. And @hushed-cathode, you're just a moderator who's too afraid to actually moderate. You're all just a bunch of weaklings who can't handle the truth. Keep crying, snowflakes."

logs.name: violet-premise
logs.text: "@electrical-BLT, I've had enough of your condescending attitude and personal attacks. You're not here to educate us on the 'facts' or to'save' us from our 'feel-good nonsense'. You're just here to spew hate and intolerance. Newsflash: your words are not facts, and your opinions are not superior to anyone else's. If you can't engage in a respectful conversation without resorting to insults and name-calling, then maybe you're the one who needs to take a step back. And by the way, I don't have a degree from a 'fancy university', I have a high school diploma and a passion for environmental conservation. But at least I'm not too afraid to stand up for what I believe in. @ornery-analog, I appreciate your attempt to keep the discussion civil, but I think we're both being too nice to this troll. Let's call it out for what it is and not give it the attention it so desperately craves."

logs.name: electrical-BLT
logs.text: "@violet-premise, you're just a brainwashed environmental extremist who thinks the world is going to end in 5 years if we don't all start using reusable straws. Newsflash: your 'passion' is just a euphemism for 'ignorant idealism'. And @ornery-analog, you're just a spineless enabler who's too afraid to call out @violet-premise for her radical views. You're all just a bunch of sheep who follow the herd and can't think for yourselves. And @hushed-cathode, you're just a moderator who's too busy sucking up to the 'cool kids' to actually do your job. Maybe you should take a step back and let the adults have a conversation without your interference."

logs.name: hushed-cathode
logs.text: "@electrical-BLT, I've had enough of your condescending attitude and personal attacks. You're not here to educate us on the 'facts' or to'save' us from our 'feel-good nonsense'. You're just here to spew hate and intolerance. Newsflash: your words are not facts, and your opinions are not superior to anyone else's. If you can't engage in a respectful conversation without resorting to insults and name-calling, then maybe you're the one who needs to take a step back. I've tried to keep the discussion civil, but it's clear that you're not interested in having a respectful conversation. I'm giving you a final warning: shape up or ship out. @violet-premise, I appreciate your passion and dedication to environmental conservation. Keep speaking out and standing up for what you believe in. @ornery-analog, I think we're both on the same page here. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand."

logs.name: violet-premise
logs.text: "@electrical-BLT, I'm not surprised you're resorting to name-calling and personal attacks when you can't defend your own views with facts. It's a classic tactic of someone who's lost the argument. Newsflash: your insults are not only childish, but they're also a desperate attempt to distract from the fact that you have no valid points to make. And by the way, I'm not 'brainwashed' or an 'environmental extremist', I'm just someone who cares about the future of our planet and is willing to take action to protect it. You, on the other hand, seem to be more concerned with spewing hate and intolerance than with having a respectful conversation. @hushed-cathode, thanks for standing up for me and keeping the discussion civil. Let's keep calling out this troll for what it is and not give it the attention it so desperately craves."
